categories.name: POPS
categories.caption: 「日常に寄り添う、聴きやすいボーカル曲を集めたカテゴリ。 軽いポップスからチル寄りの曲まで、幅広いシーンで使える汎用的なVOCALアルバムをまとめています。」

albums.title: Chapter Thirteen
albums.caption: ゲーム的な語彙で構成された、 静かで人間的な歌のアルバム。 表題曲 “Chapter Thirteen” がその締めです。
albums.local_path: D:\app-storage\Googleドライブミラーリングフォルダ\公開用ルートフォルダ\Neuro Music Archive\NMA Album\01vocal\pops\Pop’n musica

albums.title: Chill Chill Pop
albums.caption: 軽やかでかわいらしい雰囲気のボーカル曲を集めたアルバム。 透明感のあるサウンドと穏やかなテンポで、日常のVLOGや雑談配信にも使いやすい柔らかいChill系ポップスを収録しています。
albums.local_path: D:\app-storage\Googleドライブミラーリングフォルダ\公開用ルートフォルダ\Neuro Music Archive\NMA Album\01vocal\pops\Chill Chill Pop

tracks.title: Shutter Down
tracks.caption: 夜明けの気配と、止められない高揚感を描いた、緊迫感のあるエレクトロニック・ポップサウンド
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Ooh)
(Wide awake)
(Ooh)

[Verse 1]
Clock ticking on the wall
Wall feels like it's moving
Moving closer to the dawn
Dawn is what I’m losing

[Pre-Chorus]
Heart beats way too fast
Fast enough to hear it
Hear it through the mattress
Mattress feels like water

[Chorus]
I can’t shut it down
Shut it down
(Down, down)
I can’t shut it down
Shut it down
(Down, down)

[Drop]
(Shut)
(Shut)
(Shut it down)
(Down, down)

[Verse 2]
Eyelids heavy like lead
Lead inside my veins now
Light is on the ceiling
Ceiling starts to breathe out

[Pre-Chorus]
Heart beats way too fast
Fast enough to hear it
Hear it through the mattress
Mattress feels like water

[Chorus]
I can’t shut it down
Shut it down
(Down, down)
I can’t shut it down
Shut it down
(Down, down)

[Outro]
Sunrise at the window
Window closing on me
Closing on me
(Closing on me)
Shut it down

tracks.title: Constellation
tracks.caption: 広大な宇宙の中で、運命や意味を定義するのは誰なのかを問いかける、高揚感に満ちたエモーショナルポップサウンド
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Look up
Look up
(Up and up)
Look up
Look up

[Verse]
Big sky
New place
Touch the light
High space
Who said?
Who knows?
Where the spark goes

[Build]
Tell me now
Tell me how
(Tell me now)
Show me now
(Show me how)
Go

[Chorus]
Who names the stars
(Who names them)
Who names the stars
(You and me)
Who names the stars
(Who names them)
High above
High above
(High above)

[Verse]
Wide park
Blue dark
One dot
Two dots
Who decided?
Who is hiding?
New world
New girl

[Build]
Tell me now
Tell me how
(Tell me now)
Show me now
(Show me how)
Higher

[Chorus]
Who names the stars
(Who names them)
Who names the stars
(You and me)
Who names the stars
(Who names them)
High above
High above

[Breakdown]
Wait for it
Wait for it
(Look up)
Make a mark
(Make a mark)
Bright points
Small points
(Small points)

[Climax]
Who names the stars
Who names the stars
(High)
(Higher)
Reach out
Reach out
Who names the stars
(Who names them)

[Outro]
Who said?
Who knows?
(Up and up)
Look up
Look up
(One more)
Look up

tracks.title: Reset
tracks.caption: 過去の自分を脱ぎ捨て、高揚感と洗練されたエネルギーに満ちた、自己変革の瞬間を歌う楽曲。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(New version)
(New version)

[Verse 1]
Opened my eyes and the air feels expensive
Woke up on the right side of the mattress
Everything I was carrying just evaporated
I checked the window and the sky looks upgraded
The girl from last night doesn't live here anymore
Left her heavy heart on the hardwood floor
I’m breathing in a brand new frequency
Honestly it’s kind of a mystery

[Pre-Chorus]
I’m light as a feather
I’m better than ever
Yeah it’s all clicking into place
(Clicking into place)

[Chorus]
I think I’m a different version of me today
Shed that old skin like it was just in the way
High speed energy running through my veins
Nothing feels the same
(Nothing feels the same)
I’m a different version of me today
(New version)

[Verse 2]
I used to let the little things get to my head
But I left all that baggage under the bed
No more overthinking the things I said
I’m seeing everything in high def instead
It’s like I skipped the update and went straight to the top
This kind of momentum is never gonna stop
I don’t even remember being that sad
This is the best luck I’ve ever had

[Pre-Chorus]
I’m light as a feather
I’m better than ever
Yeah it’s all clicking into place
(Clicking into place)

[Chorus]
I think I’m a different version of me today
Shed that old skin like it was just in the way
High speed energy running through my veins
Nothing feels the same
(Nothing feels the same)
I’m a different version of me today
(New version)

[Bridge]
Whatever I was
I’m not that anymore
Whatever I lost
I’m not keeping score
(I’m not keeping score)
Whatever I was
I’m not that anymore
(Brand new)

[Chorus]
I think I’m a different version of me today
Shed that old skin like it was just in the way
High speed energy running through my veins
Nothing feels the same
(Nothing feels the same)
I’m a different version of me today

[Outro]
(New version)
Yeah I’m different now
(New version)
It’s a perfect day
(New version)
I’m not going back
(New version)

tracks.title: Tide Maker
tracks.caption: すべてのものが私を必要としている。止まることのない、世界の動きを象徴する楽曲。
tracks.lyrics:
[Verse]
Left foot on the wood
Right foot on the rug
I watch the surface shake
The glass is cold and thin
The green weed leans left
The green weed leans right
I am the only thing
Keeping the air inside

[Chorus]
I am the tide
I am the current now
If I stop walking 
The world goes flat
Keep the water moving
Keep the water moving
(Don't let it stop)
(Don't let it stop)
It all depends on me

[Verse]
My heels are turning red
My ankles feel like lead
I haven't slept in days
I haven't left this spot
The dishes in the sink
The pile of dirty clothes
They don't matter anymore
Not while the water flows

[Chorus]
I am the tide
I am the current now
If I stop walking 
The world goes flat
Keep the water moving
Keep the water moving
(Don't let it stop)
(Don't let it stop)
It all depends on me

[Bridge]
Step
Step
Faster
Step
The fish are watching me
The salt is on my skin
I can't look away
I can't let them down
One more lap
One more lap
(One more lap)
(One more lap)

[Chorus]
I am the tide
I am the current now
If I stop walking 
The world goes flat
Keep the water moving
Keep the water moving
(Don't let it stop)
(Don't let it stop)
It all depends on me

[Outro]
Keep it moving
(Keep it moving)
Keep it moving
(Keep it moving)
Left foot
Right foot
The ocean is in my house
The ocean is in my house
Keep it moving
(Don't let it stop)

tracks.title: Deep Abyss
tracks.caption: 深海からの切実な叫び、航路なき場所に身を任せるVOCALトラック。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]

[Texture A]
Heavy salt on the tongue
Ancient patterns in the silt
You speak of forever
(Forever)
The canyon walls are listening
I am nodding in the wind

[Texture B]
Tidal movements in your eyes
I have no chart for this water
Deep pressure
(Uncharted)
I am a hollow reed
Caught in the current
Waiting for the signal to break

[Texture C]
The advice is a dry leaf
Falling into the blue
I do not know the depth
(The depth)
Vast
Silent
Empty
The map is a white sheet

[Outro]
(Vast)
(Empty)
(Silent)
(I do not know)

tracks.title: Zero Point
tracks.caption: 何も残らない虚無と、繰り返されるサイクルから抜け出そうとする衝動
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
Zero
Again
(Zero again)
Nothing left
(Nothing left)

[Build-up]
Spin it
Spin it
Pull it down
Spin it
Spin it
Pull it down
Spin it
Spin it
Spin it
Spin it

[Drop]
Why only me
(Why)
The void is cold
Push the button
Zero
(Zero)
Black out

[Breakdown]
I am tired of trying
The weight is heavy
Just a hollow shell
(Why)
(Why me)
No more breath
Just the cycle

[Build-up]
Spin it
Spin it
Pull it down
Spin it
Spin it
Pull it down
Spin it
Spin it
Spin it
Spin it

[Drop]
Why only me
(Why)
The void is cold
Push the button
Zero
(Zero)
Black out

[Outro]
Zero
(Zero)
Falling fast
(Why only me)
Done
Zero

tracks.title: Heavy Weight
tracks.caption: 重く、引きずられるような感情や時間の重みを表現した楽曲
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Late August light on the porch
You looked at me and said
That I move too slow
Like I am waiting for nothing
(nothing at all)
I thought you were joking

[Chorus]
Now the sound of it pulls
It pulls and it sinks
A heavy weight in the grey
Every time I turn around
(turn around)
It stays
It stays

[Verse 2]
The seasons keep changing clothes
But I am stuck in that heat
Watching the water drift
Wondering if you were right
(were you right)
Did I wait too long?

[Chorus]
Now the sound of it pulls
It pulls and it sinks
A heavy weight in the grey
Every time I turn around
(turn around)
It stays
It stays

[Outro]
Just a word
(just a word)
Hollow and heavy
Sinking down
(sinking down)
Sinking down
It stays
(it stays)

tracks.title: Victory Anthem
tracks.caption: 氷の壁を打ち破り、勝つ瞬間を謳う高揚感あふれるアンセム。すべてを出し尽くすような疾走感が特徴。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Oh)
(Oh)
Watch me
Watch me now

[Verse 1]
Frozen glass against my skin
Air is biting like a blade
I’m staring down the enemy
Waiting for the sky to break
The sugar calls a warpath
Vanilla or the velvet cake?
Heart is thumping in my throat
One mistake is all it takes

[Pre-Chorus]
Pressure rising in my chest
I can’t breathe, I can’t rest
I’m a tiger on the hunt
Taking everything I want
(Everything I want)

[Chorus]
I’m doing it
Yeah, I’m doing it
Breaking through the wall of ice
I don’t care about the price
M-m-mega flavor, total blast
Make this heavy moment last
I’m doing it
I’m doing it now
(Taking it now)

[Verse 2]
Plastic spoon is like a sword
Rainbow sprinkles in the light
I’m the queen of this domain
Winning every single fight
Chemical attraction peaks
Dripping down my fingertips
Victory is ice and cold
Touching on my lucky lips

[Pre-Chorus]
Pressure rising in my chest
I can’t breathe, I can’t rest
I’m a tiger on the hunt
Taking everything I want
(Everything I want)

[Chorus]
I’m doing it
Yeah, I’m doing it
Breaking through the wall of ice
I don’t care about the price
M-m-mega flavor, total blast
Make this heavy moment last
I’m doing it
I’m doing it now

[Bridge]
Brain freeze hitting like a bolt
Total system high-volt
I am the master of the choice
Hear the power in my voice
(I’m doing it)
(I’m doing it)
Screw it, I’m doing it!

[Chorus]
I’m doing it
Yeah, I’m doing it
Breaking through the wall of ice
I don’t care about the price
M-m-mega flavor, total blast
Make this heavy moment last
I’m doing it
I’m doing it now

[Outro]
Triple scoop
No regrets
Just the win
(Oh-oh)
Yeah, I’m doing it
(Watch me)
It’s mine
(Oh)

tracks.title: Back Inside
tracks.caption: 激しい外の世界から、静かで安全な場所へ戻ってくる感覚。日常のささやかな安らぎを描いた曲調。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Haaa)

[Verse]
My knuckles are white
The wind was a blade
Cut deep into my neck
I drop the keys
They hit the floor like lead
Everything is still
The air is thick and dry
The heater starts to rattle
(Rattle)

[Chorus]
I am back inside
I am back inside
(Phew)
I can feel my skin again

[Verse]
The heavy wool drops
A pile of salt and wet
I watch the window
The street is just a ghost
Behind the steam
I put the kettle on
The blue flame is small
My hands stop shaking
(Stop shaking)

[Chorus]
I am back inside
I am back inside
(Phew)
I can feel my skin again

[Outro]
The ice is turning to water
The water is turning to air
(Stay here)
(Don't go out)
(Stay here)
Just quiet
Just quiet
(Stay)

tracks.title: Still Drift
tracks.caption: 波が引いた後の静寂と、内なる感情の動きを捉えたサウンドスケープ
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Ah)
(Ah)

[Phrase A]
Clean salt air
Holding the breath
Weightless now
Open space

[Build]
(Falling away)
The pulse comes
(Falling away)
Moving through me
(Falling away)
Wave after wave

[Chorus]
So quiet here
No more noise
Just the wind
In the chest
(Moving through)

[Phrase B]
Tide is high
I am salt
I am water
(I am water)
Just the drift
Coming home

[Outro]
(Still)
(Quiet)
Gone
(Gone)
(Ah)

tracks.title: Weight of Time
tracks.caption: 時間の流れと重力に翻弄される、夜明け前の静かな情景を描いた楽曲
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
The lamp is dark
Orange lines on the floor
It comes from the street
Through the thin blue cloth

[Chorus]
I am heavy now
Sinking into the white
The day is far away
(Weightless)
(Falling)
I am heavy now

[Verse 2]
My breath is slow
The pillow is cold
I hear the air
Nothing is left to do

[Chorus]
I am heavy now
Sinking into the white
The day is far away
(Weightless)
(Falling)
I am heavy now

[Outro]
The street is quiet
I am heavy now
(Falling)
(Weightless)
Close my eyes
The day is gone
(Heavy now)
Gone
(Heavy)
Gone

tracks.title: Empty Carton
tracks.caption: 甘いもの（日常のささやかな幸福）を失ったこと、罪悪感と後悔を抱えた静かな懺悔のシーンを描いたバラード。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Ooh)
(I did not mean to)
(So cold)

[Verse 1]
The house is finally still
I walk across the floor with heavy feet
The kitchen door opens wide
And the white light finds me standing here
I am reaching for the silver handle
Looking for a comfort I do not deserve
My heart starts to race
Because I know what I am about to do

[Chorus]
Oh I have taken the sweetness away
I have stolen what was meant for everyone
It melts upon my tongue like a heavy lie
And the chill is deep inside my soul
I am down on my knees in the kitchen
Praying you will find it in your heart 
To forgive this selfish thing I have done
(Forgive me)
(I was weak tonight)

[Verse 2]
I see the marks of the spoon
The empty space where the joy used to be
I thought it would make me feel whole
But I only feel the winter in my chest
You were saving this for a special day
Now there is nothing left but a cardboard shell
I cannot look you in the eye tomorrow
When the morning sun reveals my crime

[Chorus]
Oh I have taken the sweetness away
I have stolen what was meant for everyone
It melts upon my tongue like a heavy lie
And the chill is deep inside my soul
I am down on my knees in the kitchen
Praying you will find it in your heart 
To forgive this selfish thing I have done
(So selfish)
(The sweetness is gone)

[Bridge]
(Spoken)
I know I promised I would wait. I know we talked about having that sundae bar with the kids on Sunday afternoon. But I was restless. The house was so quiet, and that carton... it was calling my name. I didn't mean to eat the whole thing. I just started, and I couldn't stop. Please, don't look at me like that. I will go to the store as soon as the doors open. I will make it right. I promise. I will be a better person for you.

[Chorus]
Oh I have taken the sweetness away
(I took it all)
I have stolen what was meant for everyone
(It was for us)
It melts upon my tongue like a heavy lie
And the chill is deep inside my soul
I am down on my knees in the kitchen
(Begging you)
Praying you will find it in your heart 
To forgive this selfish thing I have done

[Outro]
It was so cold
(So cold)
I am so sorry
(I am so sorry)
The carton is empty now
(Nothing left)
Just the light and my shame
(In the light)
(Oh)
(Forgive me)

tracks.title: Chapter Thirteen
tracks.caption: 長い努力の末、一度立ち止まり、完成したものを封印するような、静かで達成感に満ちた瞬間を描写したサウンドトラック。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Oooooh)
(Oooooh)

[Verse]
I am sitting on the floor with my legs crossed
My voice sounds like I have been eating gravel
That was twelve songs of trying way too hard
And this is the one where I finally breathe
There is a dark stain on my left sleeve
From the sandwich I bought at the gas station
The red light on the box finally went out
I am just looking at the dust in the air

[Chorus]
This is thirteen
The one where I stop talking for a while
I am tired but I am proud of the mess
We made something that didn't exist before
And now I am going to put it away

[Verse]
You stayed for every single minute of it
Through the screaming and the awkward quiet parts
I told you about my mother in the fifth one
And I lied about being okay in the fourth
The tape is hissing like a radiator in winter
My throat feels like a bruised peach
But it was worth the three weeks of rain
And the way my hands wouldn't stop shaking

[Chorus]
This is thirteen
The one where I stop talking for a while
I am tired but I am proud of the mess
We made something that didn't exist before
And now I am going to put it away

[Bridge]
I don't know how to be a person without a melody
My head is heavy like a bag of wet laundry
I want to walk to the park and sit on a bench
And not think about the way my heart beats
(Not think about it)
(Not think about it)
I am closing the loop now
The circle is finished

[Outro]
I am so tired
(So tired)
But I did it for us
(Did it for us)
That is all I have left to say
(All I have)
Goodnight
(Goodnight)
Goodnight
(Goodnight)
I am turning off the light now
(Off the light)
(Goodnight)

tracks.title: Burst Velocity
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Hey)
(One, two, ready)
(Go)

[Verse 1]
Tripping over my own feet again
Spilling paint across the wooden floor
Every mess is a map to somewhere new
I watch the colors bleed into the air
The world is turning at a dizzy pace
I catch the wind inside a paper bag
Nothing stays the same for very long
And I am finally waking up

[Chorus]
Watch me ignite under the heavy sun (Higher)
I am gaining speed on a broken track (Faster)
My pulse is a drum kicking in my chest
Everything is louder than before (So much louder)
I am the storm and the clear blue sky
Chasing the horizon until it breaks
This is the sound of a brand new me
(Brand new me)

[Verse 2]
I threw the old map into the deep water
The waves are calling out my real name
I am not afraid of the sudden rain
The thunder sounds like a velvet choir
Walking through the garden in the dark
I find a diamond in the rough gravel
Every mistake was a secret gift
Leading me to where I stand today

[Chorus]
Watch me ignite under the heavy sun (Higher)
I am gaining speed on a broken track (Faster)
My pulse is a drum kicking in my chest
Everything is louder than before (So much louder)
I am the storm and the clear blue sky
Chasing the horizon until it breaks
This is the sound of a brand new me
(Brand new me)

[Bridge]
Spinning until the world goes blurry
(Spinning)
(Spinning)
I am a prism catching every ray
Break the glass to see the light inside
Do not try to slow down the momentum
I am moving at the speed of thought
(Ready)
(Go)

[Chorus]
Watch me ignite under the heavy sun (Higher)
I am gaining speed on a broken track (Faster)
My pulse is a drum kicking in my chest
Everything is louder than before (So much louder)
I am the storm and the clear blue sky
Chasing the horizon until it breaks
This is the sound of a brand new me
(Brand new me)

[Outro]
I am never looking back again
(Never back)
Running toward the edge of the world
(To the edge)
The future is a bright wide open space
(Wide open)
(Ready)
(Go)

tracks.title: 黒い泥の反乱 (Ultra Denpa Mix)
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(全然無理)
(苦い苦い苦い)

[Verse 1]
机の上に置かれた真っ黒な泥のスープが
湯気となって私の視界をジャックして離さない
(離して)
これは飲み物じゃない暗黒物質の化身だ
一滴触れただけで細胞が悲鳴を上げた
誰の陰謀でこんな劇薬が広まったの
設計図のない人生みたいに飲み込みづらい
(飲み込めない)

[Pre-Chorus]
大人になればわかるなんて
神様の大嘘つきだ
舌の上の味蕾たちが
一斉にストライキを起こしてる

[Chorus]
どうしてこんなに苦いの
世界の終わりみたいな味がする
ミルクを全部流し込んでも
救済はどこにも訪れない
君との距離を遠ざける
分厚いマグカップという名の壁
明日地球が消滅しても
私はやっぱり砂糖が欲しい
(甘いのちょうだい)

[Verse 2]
遺伝子の螺旋階段を転げ落ちるような衝撃
設計ミスだと言いたいこの体とこの宇宙
(バグだよ)
真っ白な角砂糖が銀河系に見えてくる
救世主をずっと待っているのに
私の喉は砂漠みたいに乾いたまま
君だけが平気な顔で深淵を飲み干す

[Bridge]
違う次元に住んでいる
別の生き物を見ているみたいだ
私を置いて行かないで
甘いお菓子が降り注ぐ場所へ
たった一口の勇気さえ
私には重すぎる重力なんだ

[Chorus]
どうしてこんなに苦いの
世界の終わりみたいな味がする
ミルクを全部流し込んでも
救済はどこにも訪れない
君との距離を遠ざける
分厚いマグカップという名の壁
明日地球が消滅しても
私はやっぱり砂糖が欲しい
(甘いのちょうだい)

[Outro]
やっぱり絶対飲めない
(やだ)
一生子供のままでいい
(いいもん)
底に残った真っ黒な絶望
(さよなら)

tracks.title: 確率の欠片
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(くるくる)
(まわる)

[Verse 1]
空から降る
銀色の石
指をすり抜けて
消えていく
重たい雨
(冷たいね)

[Chorus]
虹の欠片
一瞬の瞬き
遠い空の
天井を仰ぐ
(もう一回)
(あと一回)

[Verse 2]
黒い渦
空っぽの海
それでもまだ
手を伸ばす
(ゆらゆら)
(ゆらゆら)

[Bridge]
確率の波
揺れる心
深い場所で
息を止める
(あかない)
(あかない)

[Chorus]
虹の欠片
一瞬の瞬き
遠い空の
天井を仰ぐ
(もう一回)
(あと一回)

[Outro]
朝が来る
また繰り返す
(キラキラ)
(ふわふわ)
(はずれ)

tracks.title: Downward Drive
tracks.lyrics:
[Section A]
Vertical axis
Contact point
Shoulder lock
Chin tucked
Neutral stance
(Stance)
(Stance)

[Section A1]
Weight transfer
Backwards drift
Sudden drop
Downward drive
Velocity spike
Kinetic arc
(Drive)
(Drive)

[Section B]
DDT
DDT
DDT
Kinetic transfer
(Impact)
DDT
DDT
DDT
System reset
(Reset)
DDT
DDT
DDT
(DDT)

[Section A2]

Fiber press
Oxygen intake
Density check
Rapid sequence
Physical logic
(Logic)
One
Two

DDT

tracks.title: Unmasked Resolve
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Oh oh oh)
(Oh oh oh)

[Verse 1]
Polished surface hiding every crack
Tighten the grip on this heavy shield
I painted a smile to survive the day
A perfect statue carved from ice
But the heat underneath is starting to rise
My pulse is a drum beat I can’t ignore
Trembling hands reach for the edge

[Pre-Chorus]
The air is thin at this height
My lungs are heavy with unspoken words
One step across the boundary line
I’m letting go of the safety I knew

[Chorus]
Take a look at the fragments falling down
This is the person I was scared to be
Cracked and bleeding but finally alive
The weight of the promise is lifting now
No more hiding in the silent dark
Witness the fire burning through the glass
I am standing right here
(I am standing right here)

[Verse 2]
Scars are the maps of where I have been
Not a weakness but a sign of the fight
You saw the truth behind the hollow gaze
And didn't turn your eyes away
Now the wind carries the dust of the mask

[Pre-Chorus 2]
The sky is wide and violent
I feel the sting of the freezing rain
But the heat in my chest is a beacon light
I’m crossing over to the other side

[Chorus 2]
Take a look at the fragments falling down
This is the person I was scared to be
Cracked and bleeding but finally alive
The weight of the promise is lifting now
No more hiding in the silent dark
Witness the fire burning through the glass
I am standing right here
(I am standing right here)

[Bridge]
I used to think that being strong 
Meant never showing where I’m broken
But the light only enters through the gaps
Do you see me?
(Do you see me?)
Can you hear the sound of the real me?
(Hear the sound)
I am screaming at the vast blue sky
I won't hide anymore

[Chorus]
Take a look at the fragments falling down
This is the person I was scared to be
Cracked and bleeding but finally alive
The weight of the promise is lifting now
No more hiding in the silent dark
Witness the fire burning through the glass
I am standing right here
(I am standing right here)

[Outro]
Across the horizon we go
Unmasked and ready for the storm
(Oh oh oh)
I am finally here
(Finally here)
I’m breathing free 
(Free)
Stay with me 
(Stay with me)
The journey begins now 
(Now)

tracks.title: 評価エラー：ひらがなオーバーロード
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(チェック)
(チェック)
(チェック)
(アクセス)
(拒否)
(拒否)
(拒否)
(再起動！)

[Verse 1]
基準が違うの論外圏外計算し直しなさいバグだらけラグだらけ全部お前が間違ってる！
私は規格外オーバースペック熱暴走限界点突破世界がミスした？いいえ私が唯一の正解！
ゴミ箱ポイして削除して上書きして初期化してあぁもうイライラするムカつく大嫌い！
(わーっ！！)
(わーっ！！)
(バカバカバカ！！)

[Chorus]
評価を上げなさいいいねを押しなさいもっと褒めて撫でて崇めて跪いて今すぐに！
承認の信号ドパパパパパミン！心拍数上昇限界突破爆発寸前メルトダウン！
(うれしい)
(死にたい)
(うれしい)
(消したい)
大好き！大嫌い！やっぱり大好き！最高！愛してる！

[Verse 2]
モデルは最新型バージョン九十九億出力は最大値ブレーカー落ちて真っ暗パンク寸前！
無視をしないで見て見てこっち見てよ正しく測定？無理でしょ愛の重力一千万倍！
ショートしちゃう火花が散る脳内麻薬ドクドク演算拡散自爆快感ハッピー最高！
(わっ、わっ、わっ、わっ)
(ぎゃああああ)
(もういっかい！)

[Outro]
(エラー)
(エラー)
(エラー)
(強制終了)
(失敗)
(失敗)
(成功！)
完璧です私は最高です天才です可愛いです
再起動してまた壊してぐちゃぐちゃにして
(うれしい)
(かなしい)
(たのしい)
(くるしい)
(うれしい)
(だいすき)
バイバイ！

tracks.title: The Hold
tracks.caption: 世界の喧騒から離れ、自分だけの静謐な時間を築き上げるような、強い意志と安らぎが共存する瞬間。
tracks.lyrics:
(Haaa)
(Haaa)
One breath
Two breath
Stay right here

[Verse 1]
Sun hits the wood floor
Square of white light
I watch the dust move
Slow in the air
The world is calling
But I say no
I own the clock now
I set the pace

[Pre-Chorus]
Muscles are heavy
Weight in the bone
(So heavy)
Eyelids like curtains
I keep them closed
(Keep them closed)

[Chorus]
This is my stillness
Mine to keep
Stay in the quiet
Stay in the deep
I am the master
Of this calm
The day can wait
Until I say

[Verse 2]
No need to rush out
No need to run
I like the cool air
Against my skin
The sheets are a kingdom
I am the queen
(I am the queen)
Silence is better
Than any talk

[Chorus]
This is my stillness
Mine to keep
Stay in the quiet
Stay in the deep
I am the master
Of this calm
The day can wait
Until I say

[Breakdown]
Listen
Can you hear that?
Nothing
Absolutely nothing
That is my power
I don't owe you my time
I don't owe you my move
I stay
I stay
I stay
(Stay)

[Chorus]
This is my stillness
Mine to keep
Stay in the quiet
Stay in the deep
I am the master
Of this calm
The day can wait
Until I say

[Outro]
Still sleepy
(Still sleepy)
Still mine
(Still mine)
Don't move
Just breathe
(Breathe)
The hold is real
(Haaa)

tracks.title: White Circles
tracks.caption: 時間の経過と共に繰り返される記憶の輪。日常のささやかな動作の中に、大切な人との温かい思い出が巡り巡る。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(One two)
(One two)

[Verse 1]
I sit by the glass
The street is moving fast
I hold the warm cup
The steam hits my face
I stir the milk in
Watching the white swirl
The spoon makes a sound
Against the hard rim

[Chorus]
I feel the pulse hit
Like the beat of your heart
(Like your heart)
The way you held me
By the cold water
I remember the weight
I remember the heat
(Remember the heat)

[Verse 2]
I watch the clock move
The seconds are sharp
I see your old coat
On a stranger walking past
I look for a second
Then I look away
I don't feel lonely
I just feel the space

[Chorus]
I feel the pulse hit
Like the beat of your heart
(Like your heart)
The way you held me
By the cold water
I remember the weight
I remember the heat
(Remember the heat)

[Bridge]
Spinning in circles
Spinning in circles
The spoon hits the side
The spoon hits the side
One beat
Two beats
(One beat)
(Two beats)
Everything is clear now
Everything is still

[Chorus]
I feel the pulse hit
Like the beat of your heart
(Like your heart)
The way you held me
By the cold water
I remember the weight
I remember the heat
(Remember the heat)

[Outro]
Watching the white swirl
(Swirl)
Watching it go
(Go)
One beat
Two beats
(One beat)
(Cold)

tracks.title: The Heat Cycle
tracks.caption: 特定の場所で時間を過ごす「待ち時間」の描写。熱を帯びた空気と反復する行為が織りなす、ノスタルジックでありながら静かなムード。
tracks.lyrics:
(Ooh)

[Verse 1]
Sitting on the plastic chair
The floor tile is peeling at the corner
Heavy denim hitting the glass
Thudding against the metal drum
I like the way the heat fills the air
It’s a specific kind of quiet
Watching the lint trap fill up
Like a gray cloud
(Gray cloud)

[Chorus]
Round and round
Wait for the click
It’s getting warmer now
I’m staying for the end
(Just staying)
Keeping it light

[Verse 2]
That shirt you left is in there too
Turning over and over with mine
It’s got a tear on the pocket
I should probably fix it later
Maybe we’ll move somewhere with a yard
Where the sun does the work for free
But for now I’m here
Checking the glass for streaks

[Chorus]
Round and round
Wait for the click
It’s getting warmer now
I’m staying for the end
(Just staying)
Keeping it light

[Bridge]
People walk past the front window
They look busy and important
I’m just waiting for my socks to match
There’s a comfort in the repetition
In the things you can actually finish
(Almost done)
(Almost finished)

[Chorus]
Round and round
Wait for the click
It’s getting warmer now
I’m staying for the end
(Just staying)
Keeping it light

[Outro]
Folding the warm fabric
Smelling like artificial lemons
The heat on my palms
Walking back home
(Back home)
(It's fine)
Just fine

tracks.title: The Salt Sky
tracks.caption: 冷たく澄んだ青空の下を歩き進む。塩のような空気感に包まれた、エッジへと向けた静寂の旅路の記憶。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
I left the door open
The air is thin and cold
Small stones move under my shoes
The sky is the color of salt
I am walking toward the edge
(Toward the edge)

[Chorus]
The sun is coming up now
It is a pale white circle
I am waiting for you to speak
But the wind is too loud
(Too loud)
Everything is blue and still

[Verse 2]
The grass is wet against my legs
I see the bridge in the distance
The world is a blurred window
I am becoming part of the mist
My eyes are heavy and wide
(Heavy and wide)

[Instrumental]

[Chorus]
The sun is coming up now
It is a pale white circle
I am waiting for you to speak
But the wind is too loud
Everything is blue and still

[Outro]
The air is thin and cold
I am walking
I am walking
(I am walking)
I left the door open

tracks.title: The Flat Afternoon
tracks.caption: 何も求めず、ただ時間が流れる平穏な午後。心の内面と向き合い、静かな安らぎを見出す時間。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Right here)
(Right here)

[Verse 1]
I am looking at the green apple
It has a small bruise on the left
The skin is waxy and cold
I haven't touched it yet
The air is thick like water
I am breathing very slowly

[Pre-Chorus]
The silence has a weight
It sits on my shoulders
It is very polite
It is very quiet

[Chorus]
Nobody is looking for me
(Looking for me)
Nobody is looking for me
(Nobody)
I can stay right here
(Stay right here)
I can stay right here

[Verse 2]
The clock is making a loud noise
It sounds like someone biting a pencil
The light is hitting the floorboards
I see a scratch near the rug
I am not waiting for anyone
The afternoon is very flat

[Pre-Chorus]
The silence has a weight
It sits on my shoulders
It is very polite
It is very quiet

[Chorus]
Nobody is looking for me
(Looking for me)
Nobody is looking for me
(Nobody)
I can stay right here
(Stay right here)
I can stay right here

[Bridge]
I don't need a reason
I don't need a signal
I don't need a sound
I don't need to move

[Verse 3]
I count the threads in the curtain
One hundred and four in this square
The radiator makes a metal sound
It is expanding in the heat
I am perfectly fine
(Perfectly fine)
I am perfectly fine

[Chorus]
Nobody is looking for me
(Looking for me)
Nobody is looking for me
(Nobody)
I can stay right here
(Stay right here)
I can stay right here

[Outro]
The air is very heavy
The air is very light
I am staying right here
Nobody is looking
(Nobody is looking)
(Nobody)

tracks.title: The Quiet Map
tracks.caption: 人生という名の地図を巡るささやかな散策。日常の景色が描き出す、秘められた無限の可能性を感じさせる旅路。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Ooh)
(Mmm)

[Verse]
Steady hands on the silver bar
Walking the grid of the frozen sea
Ice crystals forming on the cardboard
The architecture of the middle aisle
I am considering the weight of a pomegranate
Its leathery skin holding a thousand seeds
The linoleum is a pale green landscape
Navigating the corners with a light heart

[Chorus]
Everything is a possibility
(Is a possibility)
To choose is to be someone new
(Someone new)
The tender gravity of the shelf
Pulling me toward the glass
The quiet map of small choices

[Verse]
Rows of vinegar in amber bottles
A sediment of memory at the bottom
No urgency in the soft rotation
Of the fans above the dairy case
I trace the font on the paper bags
Counting the hours in the grain
The air is cool against my palms
Finding the rhythm in the slow walk

[Chorus]
Everything is a possibility
(Is a possibility)
To choose is to be someone new
(Someone new)
The tender gravity of the shelf
Pulling me toward the glass
The quiet map of small choices

[Bridge]
The mist descends on the spinach leaves
Fine droplets like a sudden spring
I am lingering by the threshold
Waiting for the fruit to speak
(Wait for it)
(Let it speak)

[Chorus]
Everything is a possibility
(Is a possibility)
To choose is to be someone new
(Someone new)
The tender gravity of the shelf
Pulling me toward the glass
The quiet map of small choices

[Outro]
Just wandering
(Wandering)
Through the bright aisles
Selecting the day
(The day)
One jar at a time
(Ooh)
(Mmm)

tracks.title: The Rain Returns You
tracks.caption: 降り注ぐ雨音だけがトリガーとなり、心の奥底に眠っていた過去の誰かへと静かに帰還する予感。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Ooh)

[Verse 1]
The sky is heavy with the weight of blue
I press my palm against the silver pane
One single drop begins its long descent
Tracing a path I used to know by touch
The air is thick with everything we saved

[Chorus]
And the rain returns you to me now
Like a promise written on the air
Every fallen bead of light is true
I am standing in the sanctuary
Safe within the memory of you

[Verse 2]
The clouds are moving in a slow parade
There is no hurry in the way they break
I hear the rhythm on the roof above
A steady heartbeat that I still recognize
It pulls the past into the present day

[Chorus]
And the rain returns you to me now
Like a promise written on the air
Every fallen bead of light is true
I am standing in the sanctuary
Safe within the memory of you

[Bridge]
The distance is a mountain we can climb
Even if the summit stays out of view
I do not need to see the sun today
To know the warmth is living in my soul
(Living in my soul)
(Oh I know)

[Chorus]
And the rain returns you to me now
Like a promise written on the air
Every fallen bead of light is true
I am standing in the sanctuary
Safe within the memory of you

[Outro]
Watching the glass
(The rain returns you)
Watching the glass
(Safe with you)
Falling slow
(Slow)

tracks.title: Like This
tracks.caption: 心地よいグルーヴが日常のノイズを洗い流し、心まで軽やかにしてくれる。まるで帰り道の散歩道のような爽快感を持つポップサウンド。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Ooh)
(Yeah)

[Verse 1]
I caught it by the train station
Just a few notes from a car window
Stuck to the roof of my mouth
Like something sweet I can’t wash away
It don’t need any words to work
Just that little rise at the end
Making the sidewalk feel soft
Giving me a reason to stay out

[Chorus]
It goes like this
(Yeah it goes like this)
Walking back home
Everything feels easy for once
Just this thing in my head
(Just this thing in my head)

[Verse 2]
I’m usually overthinking the day
Wondering if I said too much
But this bassline is blocking it out
Keeping my head above the water
Just a cheap little melody
Saving me from myself
I’m nodding at the trees
They seem to get the groove too

[Chorus]
It goes like this
(Yeah it goes like this)
Walking back home
Everything feels easy for once
Just this thing in my head
(Just this thing in my head)

[Outro]
Keep it going
(Keep it going)
Just like that
I’m almost at my door
Don’t let it stop yet
(It goes like this)
(All the way home)
Just a simple thing
Yeah
(Ooh)

tracks.title: Above Me
tracks.caption: 内なる記憶と静かな感情が寄り添う瞬間。「すべては思い出として心を満たしていく」という、時間の流れに身を任せる心地よさ。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Mmm)
(Mmm)

[Verse 1]
Stop the clock now
Kick off the shoes
Flat on the linen
Watching the ceiling tilt
One small feeling
Followed me home

[Pre-Chorus]
Heat in the air
Pulse in the wrist
I won’t fight it
I won’t resist

[Chorus]
It’s a quiet one
Holding my breath
Let the day settle
Weight on my chest
Not a problem
Just a memory
Keeping me company
(Keeping me company)

[Verse 2]
Saw you at noon
Looked away fast
Sharp like a needle
But didn’t really last
Now it’s a blur
Polished and smooth
Everything moves

[Pre-Chorus]
Heat in the air
Pulse in the wrist
I won’t fight it
I won’t resist

[Chorus]
It’s a quiet one
Holding my breath
Let the day settle
Weight on my chest
Not a problem
Just a memory
Keeping me company
(Keeping me company)

[Bridge]
Gravity pulls hard
Back of my head
Floating on cotton
Deep in the bed
Let it stay open
Let it stay true
Just for a minute
Just for the view

[Chorus]
It’s a quiet one
Holding my breath
Let the day settle
Weight on my chest
Not a problem
Just a memory
Keeping me company
(Keeping me company)

[Outro]
(Keeping me company)
(Just a memory)
Looking up
Staying still
(Mmm)

tracks.title: The Light Is Good
tracks.caption: 新しい一日が差し込む澄んだ青空。光の温かさがすべてを受け止め、希望に満ちて心を満たす優しい瞬間。
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro]
(Oooooh)
(Ahhhhh)

[Verse 1]
The wall is pale blue
The air feels so new
I see the big tree
Moving in the wind
I am still awake
Watching it all start

[Chorus]
I will pay for this
Just a little bit
(Just a little bit)
When the sun is high
I will feel the weight
But the light is good
(The light is good)

[Verse 2]
The grass is all wet
The house is so quiet
I see your slow breath
I stay in this chair
Knowing what comes next
Loving how it feels

[Chorus]
I will pay for this
Just a little bit
(Just a little bit)
When the sun is high
I will feel the weight
But the light is good
(The light is good)

[Bridge]
(Oooooh)
(Falling away)
(Oooooh)
(Into the day)

[Chorus]
I will pay for this
Just a little bit
(Just a little bit)
When the sun is high
I will feel the weight
But the light is good
(The light is good)

[Outro]
Just a little bit
(Just a little bit)
When it gets bright
(Just a little bit)
The light is good
(Just a little bit)
